---
name: 🎨 UI/UX Enhancement
about: Propose improvements to the user interface, responsiveness, styling, or overall user experience.
title: "[UI/UX]: "
labels: ["ui/ux", "enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

### 🎨 Current User Experience & Layout
Describe the current UI layout and any pain points or limitations (e.g., "The search input field feels cluttered on mobile devices...").

### ✨ Proposed Visual/UX Enhancements
Describe the proposed changes in detail:
- What visual elements will be changed or added (e.g., colors, typography, spacing, layouts)?
- Are there any animations, hover effects, or micro-interactions being introduced?
- How does this improve usability for the user?

### 📷 Visual References & Mockups
Attach screenshots of the current UI, design sketches, wireframes, or reference links to other websites showing similar designs.

### 📱 Responsive Design Considerations
How will these changes behave on different viewport sizes (Mobile, Tablet, Desktop)?

### 🙋 Assignment
- [ ] I would like to work on this issue and be assigned to it.
